---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem to help us improve MotionFolio
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / recordings

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording (helpful for animation/scroll
issues).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125, Safari 17]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 22.3.0]
- npm version: [e.g. 10.8.0]
- MotionFolio version / commit: [e.g. 0.1.0 or commit SHA]

## Console / build output

Paste any relevant errors from the browser console or `npm run build`.

```text
(paste here)
```

## Additional context

- [ ] The AI terminal assistant is enabled (an API key is set).
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` is enabled on my system.

Add any other context about the problem here.
